fileBaselines.content:
[General]
CurrentTheme = omarchy

# Icon size (px) (default 23)
IconSize = 34

# Window overlay layer height (background, bottom, top, overlay) (default top)
Layer = top

# Exclusive Zone (true, false) (default true)
Exclusive = true

# SmartView (true, false) (default false)
SmartView = true

# Window position on screen (top, bottom, left, right) (default bottom)
Position = bottom

# Delay before hiding the dock (ms) (default 400)
AutoHideDelay = 400   # Only for SmartView

# Use system gap (true, false) (default true)
SystemGapUsed = true

# Indent from the edge of the screen (px) (default 8)
Margin = 8

# Distance of the context menu from the window (px) (default 5)
ContextPos = 5



[General.preview]
# Window thumbnail mode selection (none, live, static) (default none)
Mode = none
# "none"   - disabled (text menus)
# "static" - last window frame (stable)
# "live"   - window streaming (unstable) !EXPEREMENTAL!
      
# !WARNING! 
# BY SETTING "Mode" TO "live" OR "static", YOU AGREE TO THE CAPTURE 
# OF WINDOW CONTENTS.
# THE "HYPR-DOCK" PROGRAM DOES NOT COLLECT, STORE, OR TRANSMIT ANY DATA.
# WINDOW CAPTURE OCCURS ONLY FOR THE DURATION OF THE THUMBNAIL DISPLAY!
#   
# Source code: https://github.com/lotos-linux/hypr-dock

# Live preview fps (0 - ∞) (default 30)
FPS = 30

# Live preview bufferSize (1 - 20) (default 5)
BufferSize = 5

# Popup show/hide/move delays (ms)
ShowDelay = 500  # (default 500)
HideDelay = 350  # (default 350)
MoveDelay = 100  # (default 100)

[Theme]
# Distance between elements (px) (default 9)
Spacing = 5

[Theme.preview]
# Size (px) (default 120)
Size = 120

# Image/Stream border-radius (px) (default 0)
Border Radius = 10

# Padding (px) (default 5)
Padding = 10

# /* ---- 💫 https://github.com/LinuxBeginnings 💫 ---- */  #
# Decoration Settings

# Hyprland Wiki Links
# Animation - https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Animations/
# Decoration - https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/#decoration

# Sourcing colors generated by wallust
#source = $HOME/.config/hypr/wallust/wallust-hyprland.conf

general {
  border_size = 2
  gaps_in = 4
  gaps_out = 6

  #col.active_border = $color12
  #col.inactive_border = $color10
}

decoration {
  rounding = 10
  
  active_opacity = 0.9
  inactive_opacity = 0.8
  fullscreen_opacity = 1.0

  dim_inactive = true
  dim_strength = 0.1
  dim_special = 0.8

  shadow {
    enabled = false
    range = 3
    render_power = 1

    #color =  $color12
    #color_inactive = $color10
  }

  blur {
    enabled = true
    size = 14
    passes = 2
    new_optimizations = true
    xray = false
    ignore_opacity = true
    special = true
    popups = true
  }
}

# If not running interactively, don't do anything (leave this at the top of this file)
[[ $- != *i* ]] && return

# All the default Omarchy aliases and functions
# (don't mess with these directly, just overwrite them here!)
source ~/.local/share/omarchy/default/bash/rc

# Add your own exports, aliases, and functions here.
#
# Make an alias for invoking commands you use constantly
# alias p='python'

export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

source /usr/share/cachyos-fish-config/cachyos-config.fish

# overwrite greeting
# potentially disabling fastfetch
#function fish_greeting
#    # smth smth
#end

# disable greeting
set -g fish_greeting

# PATH
fish_add_path ~/.local/bin

# EDITOR
# set -gx EDITOR nvim

# aliases
alias ls="eza --icons"
alias ll="eza -lah --icons --git"
alias la="eza -a --icons"
alias lt="eza --tree --level=2 --icons"

alias cat="bat"
alias grep="rg"

# zoxide
zoxide init fish | source

# fzf keybindings
fzf --fish | source

# starship prompt
starship init fish | source

# Changes require a restart to take effect.

# Ensure Omarchy bins are in the path
export OMARCHY_PATH=$HOME/.local/share/omarchy
export PATH=$OMARCHY_PATH/bin:$PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Set default terminal and editor
source ~/.config/uwsm/default

# Activate mise if present on the system
if [ "$SHELL" = "/bin/bash" ] && command -v mise &> /dev/null; then
  eval "$(mise activate bash)"
elif [ "$SHELL" = "/bin/fish" ] && command -v mise &> /dev/null; then
  mise activate fish | source
fi

# NVIDIA
export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=nvidia
export GBM_BACKEND=nvidia-drm
export __GLX_VENDOR_LIBRARY_NAME=nvidia
export NVD_BACKEND=direct
export MOZ_DISABLE_RDD_SANDBOX=1
export CUDA_DISABLE_PERF_BOOST=1
export QT_QPA_PLATFORM=wayland;xcb
export GDK_BACKEND=wayland,x11,*

# Extra env variables
# Note: You must relaunch Hyprland after changing envs (use Super+Esc, then Relaunch)
# env = MY_GLOBAL_ENV,setting


# Refer to https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/




# Fcitx5-unikey #
env = XMODIFIERS=@im,fcitx
env = GTK_IM_MODULE,fcitx
env = QT_IM_MODULE,fcitx

# Locale #
env = LANG,vi_VN.UTF-8
env = LC_ALL,vi_VN.UTF-8

{ "workbench.colorTheme": "Dark Horizon",   
  
  "update.mode": "none",
  "security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
  "window.confirmBeforeClose": "always",
  "editor.minimap.renderCharacters": false,
  "editor.minimap.enabled": false,
  "workbench.layoutControl.enabled": false,
  "gitlens.ai.model": "vscode",
  "gitlens.ai.vscode.model": "copilot:gpt-4.1",
  "workbench.iconTheme": "material-icon-theme",
  "editor.fontFamily": "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font",
  "editor.tabSize": 4,
  "editor.wordWrap": "on",
  "editor.renderWhitespace": "selection",
  "workbench.startupEditor": "none",
  "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
  "files.autoSaveDelay": 1000,
  "terminal.integrated.fontSize": 14,
  "workbench.settings.applyToAllProfiles": [
    "editor.fontSize"
  ]
,
  "material-code.primaryColor": ""
}

[Theme.preview]

# Image/Stream border-radius (px) (default 0)
BorderRadius = 0

# Restart hypr-dock to apply new theme
pkill hypr-dock
hypr-dock &

|| true
hypr-dock &

success "Hypr Dock theme updated!"

Spacing = 5

[Theme.preview]
# Size (px) (default 120)

# Image/Stream border-radius (px) (default 0)
Border Radius = 10

# Padding (px) (default 5)

40

# Window overlay layer height (background, bottom, top, overlay) (default top)
Layer = top

# Exclusive Zone (true, false) (default true)
Exclusive = true

# SmartView (true, false) (default false)
SmartView = true

# Window position on screen (top, bottom, left, right) (default bottom)
Position = bottom

# Delay before hiding the dock (ms) (default 400)
AutoHideDelay = 400   # Only for SmartView

# Use system gap (true, false) (default true)
SystemGapUsed = true

# Indent from the edge of the screen (px) (default 8)
Margin = 20

input_file="$HOME/.config/omarchy/current/theme/colors.toml"

if ! command -v firefox >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    skipped "Firefox"
fi

# Extract color value from colors.toml (flat key=value format)
extract_color() {
    local color_name="$1"
    awk -v color="$color_name" '
        $1 == color && /=/ {
            if (match($0, /#([0-9a-fA-F]{6})/)) {
                print substr($0, RSTART + 1, 6)
                exit
            }
        }
    ' "$input_file"
}

# Extract colors
primary_background=$(extract_color "background")
primary_foreground=$(extract_color "foreground")
normal_white=$(extract_color "color7")
bright_white=$(extract_color "color15")
normal_red=$(extract_color "color1")
normal_yellow=$(extract_color "color3")
bright_yellow=$(extract_color "color11")
normal_green=$(extract_color "color2")
normal_cyan=$(extract_color "color6")
normal_blue=$(extract_color "color4")
normal_magenta=$(extract_color "color5")
bright_red=$(extract_color "color9")

# Wayland and Hyprland specific
export QT_STYLE_OVERRIDE=kvantum
export SDL_VIDEODRIVER=wayland,x11
export MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1
export ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=wayland
export OZONE_PLATFORM=wayland
export XDG_SESSION_TYPE=wayland
export XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP=Hyprland
export XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP=Hyprland
export XCURSOR_SIZE=24
export HYPRCURSOR_SIZE=24
export XCOMPOSEFILE=~/.XCompose

# Locale
export LANG=vi_VN.UTF-8
export LC_ALL=vi_VN.UTF-8

"workbench.colorTheme": "Dark Horizon",
  "workbench.iconTheme": "material-icon-theme",
  "editor.fontFamily": "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font",
  "editor.fontSize": 14,
  "editor.tabSize": 4,
  "editor.wordWrap": "on",
  "editor.renderWhitespace": "selection",
  "editor.cursorBlinking": "solid",
  "editor.minimap.enabled": false,
  "editor.minimap.renderCharacters": false,
  "workbench.layoutControl.enabled": false,
  "workbench.startupEditor": "none",
  "workbench.editor.enablePreview": false,
  "explorer.openEditors.visible": 0,
  "breadcrumbs.enabled": false,
  "workbench.activityBar.visible": false,
  "workbench.statusBar.visible": false,
  "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
  "files.autoSaveDelay": 1000,
  "terminal.integrated.fontSize": 14,
  "terminal.integrated.shell.linux": "/bin/fish",
  "update.mode": "none",
  "security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
  "window.confirmBeforeClose": "always",
  "telemetry.telemetryLevel": "off",
  "extensions.ignoreRecommendations": true,
  "gitlens.ai.enabled": false,
  "workbench.settings.applyToAllProfiles": [
    "editor.fontSize"
  ]
